# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud storage security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "my-app-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowApplicationAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub "ec2.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::my-app-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}/*"

  S3BucketAccessControl:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub "ec2.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::my-app-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}/*"

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket.
